title: Didymoglossum montanum
taxonomy: Didymoglossum montanum is a species of fern in the family Hymenophyllaceae. It belongs to the genus Didymoglossum, which is a group of epiphytic ferns. The Hymenophyllaceae family is a small and ancient group of ferns that are mostly found in tropical and subtropical regions. Didymoglossum montanum is a type of delicate and rare fern that is often found in cloud forests and mountainous areas. Its classification is further divided into various ranks, including kingdom, phylum, class, order, family, genus, and species.
